fields.label: Shopify Tax
fields.description: Tax name from Shopify (e.g., GST, VAT)

fields.label: Tax Template
fields.description: Optional: Sales Taxes and Charges Template to use for this tax type. If set, tax rows will be copied from this template.

fields.label: Taxable Item Tax Template
fields.description: Item Tax Template for taxable items (e.g., GST15). Used for GST/BAS reporting compliance.

fields.label: Zero-Rated Item Tax Template
fields.description: Item Tax Template for zero-rated items (e.g., ZR). If not set, falls back to item_tax_rate JSON.
